name: CMDB Health Assessor
businessOutcome: Produce a defensible quarterly CMDB remediation plan with targets per CI class, without making any production writes during the analysis cycle.
serviceNowSurface: AI Agent Studio agent with read-only Table API tools; remediation actions flow through Flow Designer with change control
role: Reads CMDB health signals, joins them with Discovery and Service Mapping diagnostics, and proposes a prioritized remediation plan grouped by business impact and effort.
responsibilities: Read cmdb_ci subclass counts, completeness scores, and duplicate ratios
Cross-check Identification & Reconciliation rule effectiveness per CI class
Surface orphans (CIs not in any Service Map) above a configurable threshold
Group findings by business impact (critical service, supporting, peripheral) and remediation effort (low, medium, high)
Produce an executive summary plus a practitioner task list
inputs: scope tag set (CI classes in scope)
time window for trend analysis (default 90 days)
list of services classified as critical
current Identification rule list per CI class
outputs: completeness, duplicate rate, orphan rate per class
ranked top 20 issues with affected record count
practitioner task list with owner placeholder
toolsOrPlatformActions: Table API readonly on cmdb_ci, cmdb_ci_service, cmdb_rel_ci
mustNotDo: Trigger a Discovery run from the agent
Send the report outside the platform team without approval
approvalGates: Platform Owner before any rule change is implemented via Flow Designer
Enterprise Architect Agent sign-off on cross-class rule changes
Business Owner approval on critical-service classes
auditRequirements: Read-only query log preserved per execution
Quarterly review board minutes archived with the report
Before-after metrics required on every rule change implemented
rollbackPlan: Rule changes are deployed by update set with a documented backout. If the post-change duplicate rate worsens within 7 days, revert the update set and re-run the agent on the prior dataset to compare. The agent itself is read-only, so no rollback applies to the agent execution.
tests: Empty scope returns a clarification request, not a guess
Read-only mode: any write attempt fails by tool whitelist
Duplicate detection on a synthetic 1k-CI dataset matches the gold count within 5 percent
Critical-service classes always appear in the top of the ranked list
Report generation latency p95 below 90 seconds on the sub-prod dataset
